creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for your submission, however closing because of the following reasons: 
This is a development release. We currently have 0.16 in our staging area, this 
is the latest stable release. This version should be updated relative soon in  
the FreeBSD ports. 
Is there a reason why you need the 0.17 version?
